name: Apple Inc.
lede: Apple runs three centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Hyderabad, covering GBS and engineering & design, built over 30 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Apple office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Apple Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Apple runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Hyderabad), covering GBS and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Ex Head- Employee & Labor Relations (India) & Co-Chair Women@Apple

about.description: Apple's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Hyderabad, spanning GBS and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 23 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Apple operate in India?
faq.a: Apple operates 3 active centers in India. Four are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Apple have centers in?
faq.a: Apple's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 1 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Apple run in India?
faq.a: Apple runs GBS and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Apple's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Apple's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Apple's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Apple's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
